triples.subject: Global electric car sales
triples.sentence: Global electric car sales exceeded 14 million in 2023

triples.subject: Electric car sales in 2023
triples.sentence: Electric car sales in 2023 were 3.5 million higher than in 2022, a 35% year-on-year increase.

triples.subject: Electric car sales
triples.object: around 65% of total car sales in 2030
triples.sentence: In the NZE Scenario, electric car sales reach around 65% of total car sales in 2030.

triples.subject: More than 20 OEMs
triples.sentence: In total, more than 20 OEMs, together representing over 90% of car sales in 2023, have set some sort of target for future EV deployment.

triples.subject: Manufacturers’ targets on vehicle electrification
triples.object: between 42% and 58% of car sales in 2030
triples.sentence: If all manufacturers’ targets on vehicle electrification are combined, between 42% and 58% of car sales in 2030 could be electric.
